subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

VitalisIT (healthcare) is looking for a mid Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 775 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Scala
• Redis

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
